# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins: 
        - "https://example.com"
        - "https://another-example.com"
      methods:
        - "GET"
        - "POST"
        - "OPTIONS"
      headers:
        - "Accept"
        - "Authorization"
        - "Content-Type"
        - "Origin"
        - "User-Agent"
    global: true

  - name: jwt
    config:
      key_claim_name: "user_id"
      secret_is_base64: false
    global: true

  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      second: 5
      policy: "local"
    global: true

services:
  - name: my-service
    url: "http://my-service.example.com"
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins: 
            - "https://example.com"
            - "https://another-example.com"
          methods:
            - "GET"
            - "POST"
            - "OPTIONS"
          headers:
            - "Accept"
            - "Authorization"
            - "Content-Type"
            - "Origin"
            - "User-Agent"

      - name: jwt
        config:
          key_claim_name: "user_id"
          secret_is_base64: false

      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          second: 10
          policy: "local"

routes:
  - name: my-route
    service: my-service
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins: 
            - "https://example.com"
            - "https://another-example.com"
          methods:
            - "GET"
            - "POST"
            - "OPTIONS"
          headers:
            - "Accept"
            - "Authorization"
            - "Content-Type"
            - "Origin"
            - "User-Agent"

      - name: jwt
        config:
          key_claim_name: "user_id"
          secret_is_base64: false

      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          second: 15
          policy: "local"
